name: Private Fairway Plano
about: Private Fairway Plano offers a dedicated indoor golf simulator studio experience focused on serious practice and play. The facility provides 24-hour access for members featuring TrackMan technology for precise swing data and virtual course play. Memberships are structured to accommodate different usage patterns, from unlimited monthly access to punch passes for occasional players. The environment is designed for focused golf improvement with limited membership numbers to ensure availability and personalized support through orientation and coaching resources.
why_golfers_like_it: 24-hour access with flexible booking through a mobile app
TrackMan technology providing complete club and ball data for game improvement
Limited membership ensuring consistent availability and no long waits

food_and_drink.notes: No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB policy not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Latest and most accurate system with complete club & ball data capture

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, members are expected to bring their own clubs as the facility provides the simulator technology and practice space.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided about bringing outside food or drinks to the facility.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The text doesn't specify exact timing, but mentions that members can build their team and business without a 5-hour round, suggesting faster play than traditional golf.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, the venue appears focused on serious practice and adult members, with no mention of children's programs or family-oriented features.
